generated_oml:
instance LiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for vehicle perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2 network"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDAR
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks data transmitted via ROS2 network"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDAR
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time visualization of object tracks and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, and report generation via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DrivingPathVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated report generation based on vehicle data"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computation (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, control logic) from vehicle's ECU to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ControlLogic
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detects lead vehicle for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculates appropriate speed based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes control logic for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, TriggerEmergencyBraking
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs ACC system computation offloading from ECU to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote management actions via Control Panel"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time 3D visualization of vehicle data and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables control panel functionality for remote management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity deployed on separate hardware component"
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Frontend component"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on separate hardware component"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on separate hardware component"
]

instance LowerChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower chassis layer of the 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle"
]

instance UpperChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis layer of the 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle"
]

instance AutonomyElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Autonomy elements of the vehicle"
]

instance UserInterfaceFEROS2Package : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing User Interface Frontend"
]

instance DTEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as mandated by hardware limitations, despite safety-critical vehicular standards typically requiring stricter synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows an entity-based architecture per ISO 23247 RA, with three distinct entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) each deployed on separate hardware. The Physical Twin Entity handles resource-specific functions (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) and device communication, the Digital Twin Entity manages data processing and control mechanisms, and the User Entity hosts visualization and control panel components. Each FE is implemented as a ROS2 package with associated nodes, and the architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by redefining the Physical Twin Entity's scope beyond the standard's OME."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components is facilitated by ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 Digital Twin Framework for Manufacturing standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interface, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) mentioned as a possible implementation protocol for FEs."
]
